segments.text: First listen, and then answer the question.

translations.zh-Hans: 先听录音，然后回答问题。

segments.text: Why is the rescue taking so long?

translations.zh-Hans: 营救工作为什么耗时这么久？

segments.text: Six men have been trapped in a mine for seventeen hours.

translations.zh-Hans: 六名矿工已经被困在矿井里17个小时。

segments.text: If they are not brought to the surface soon, they may lose their lives.

translations.zh-Hans: 如果不能尽快把他们救到地面，他们可能会丧命。

segments.text: However, rescue operations are proving difficult.

translations.zh-Hans: 然而，营救工作事实证明十分困难。

segments.text: If explosives are used, vibrations will cause the roof of the mine to collapse.

translations.zh-Hans: 如果使用炸药，震动会使矿井顶部坍塌。

segments.text: Rescue workers are therefore drilling a hole on the north side of the mine.

translations.zh-Hans: 因此，救援人员正在矿井北侧钻孔。

segments.text: They intend to bring the men up in a special capsule.

translations.zh-Hans: 他们打算用一个特制的救生舱把矿工送上来。

segments.text: If there had not been a hard layer of rock beneath the soil, they would have completed the job in a few hours.

translations.zh-Hans: 如果土层下面没有一层坚硬岩石，他们几小时内就能完成这项工作。

segments.text: As it is, they have been drilling for sixteen hours and they still have a long way to go.

translations.zh-Hans: 事实上，他们已经钻了16个小时，却仍有很长一段距离要打通。

segments.text: Meanwhile, a microphone, which was lowered into the mine two hours ago, has enabled the men to keep in touch with their closest relatives.

translations.zh-Hans: 与此同时，两小时前被放入矿井的一只麦克风，使矿工们能够与至亲保持联系。

segments.text: Though they are running out of food and drink, the men are cheerful and confident that they will get out soon.

translations.zh-Hans: 尽管食物和饮水即将耗尽，矿工们情绪乐观，深信自己很快就能脱险。

segments.text: They have been told that rescue operations are progressing smoothly.

translations.zh-Hans: 他们被告知营救工作进展顺利。

segments.text: If they knew how difficult it was to drill through the hard rock, they would lose heart.

translations.zh-Hans: 如果知道钻透坚硬岩层有多么困难，他们就会丧失信心。
